title: Account
description: Manage your name, preferences, and account access.

toast.saveErrorDescription: Something went wrong. Please check your connection.
toast.voicePreviewDescription: Voice samples are currently being loaded.

profile.heading: Profile
profile.description: Your name appears on resumes, in mock interview transcripts, and on shared exports.
profile.fullNameHelp: Appears on resumes generated by MockMatch and on your AI Mock Arena transcript.

appearance.heading: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose a theme for the MockMatch interface. Resume previews stay in print colours regardless.

voice.heading: Voice profile
voice.description: The voice your AI interviewer uses in the Mock Arena. Preview a sample before you commit.

region.heading: Region & format
region.description: Country drives currency, salary benchmarks, and example phrasing. Date and time formats apply to history, analytics, and exports.

account.heading: Account access
account.description: Sign out of this device, end sessions everywhere, or delete your account entirely.

signOut.title: Sign out
signOut.description: End your session on this device.

signOutEverywhere.title: Sign out everywhere
signOutEverywhere.description: End sessions on every device — including this one.
signOutEverywhere.confirmMessage: This will sign you out of all active sessions. Continue?

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently remove your resumes, mock interview history, and billing record.
